description: Unknown named shape in a refinement predicate (§53.11 E-CONTRACT-002). string(ssn) references a named shape `ssn` that is not in the built-in registry (email, url, uuid, phone, date, time, color). Named shape resolution occurs at compile time, so E-CONTRACT-002 fires (the §34 error partition).
rationale: §53.11 E-CONTRACT-002 fires when a named shape identifier in a predicate does not match any built-in or registered shape; `ssn` is not a built-in shape.
